subject: feat(debug): add comprehensive debug logging across all services and components
body:
Previously, only infrastructure code (boot, DB, workers, PWA) had debug logging.
Core business logic — graph CRUD, workspace management, query engine, analysis
algorithms, import/export, similarity detection — was completely silent in the
debug pill. This makes alpha-phase diagnosis difficult on deployed environments.

Added 9 new DebugSource types (workspace, import, export, query, analysis,
similarity, view, canvas, snapshot) with distinct colors. Added logging to:
- workspaceService (CRUD, cascade delete)
- viewService (CRUD)
- importExportService (validation, export)
- mergeService (semantic merge proposal)
- queryEngine (pipeline execution, hop expansion, find connections)
- similarityService (node/arc pair finding)
- analysisService (all 6 algorithms)
- snapshotService (take, clear)
- embeddingService (batch start/end, up-to-date checks)
- tagSuggestionService (suggestion latency)
- GraphCanvas (Cytoscape init, layout execution)
- eventBus (console.error → debugLog for listener errors)

Updated eventBus test to match debugLog change (no longer spies on console.error).

Tags: debug, logging, observability, alpha-tooling
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-logging
Semver: minor
